ItacPersonItem.Notes: Tommaso Canani was a jusrist, and the founder of the Concordi Academy in Ferrara. For his dates, see Giuliano Gliozzi`s biography of Giovanni Battista Canani, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
